title: syringa × prestoniae
intro: Syringa × prestoniae, also known as the Preston lilac, is a hybrid plant species within the Syringa genus, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Syringa × prestoniae lie in its ability to exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in wound healing and skin care applications. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve mood, and promote relaxation due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Syringa × prestoniae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of uses in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
